evidence: call_wall_acceptance_long has only one VALID_0DTE trade, but that trade had $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, -11.7 MAE, high setup quality, and strong ADX. This suggests the concept may be under-routed rather than unprofitable.
name: Call Wall Acceptance Sample Builder
risk: One-trade evidence can overfit; relaxed acceptance may add low-quality wall-chase entries or steal signals from stronger pullback profiles.
trigger: VALID_0DTE sessions with positive net DEX, positive forward DEX, and expanding call volume near an upside call wall.
validation_metric: Increase call_wall_acceptance_long to at least 5 trades with positive PnL, PnL per exposure hour above 250, worst MAE better than -100, total net profit at least 98% of run_001, and no degradation in VALID_0DTE performance.
